Candles._comment: §filtered-tape H/L: the client builds the live in-progress 1-min bar via the shared CandleAggregator, so it applies the same odd-lot-analog rule the server uses for stored candles (else the forming bar's wicks disagree with history). Keep in sync with the server's Candles:HLMinFillSize.
Candles._clientcache_comment: §client candle cache (steps 4-5, default false ⇒ byte-identical): serve a fully-covered, sealed history range from RAM instead of re-fetching over HTTP on every timeframe switch; live closes keep backgrounded resolutions warm. A miss always falls through to HTTP, so it is a pure latency win. Flip true to enable once verified on a running client.
